ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., marathon, trail run) */,
  "distance" TEXT /* Distance of the event (e.g., 8km / 5m) */,
  "ascent" TEXT /* Ascent of the event (e.g., 318m / 1043ft) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time the event starts */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time the event ends */,
  "registration_open_date" TEXT /* Date when registration opens */,
  "registration_close_date" TEXT /* Date when registration closes */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "entry_fee" REAL /* Cost of registration */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the entry fee */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event organizer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the event is held */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the event is held */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the event is held */,
  "distance_miles" REAL /* Distance of the event in miles */,
  "climb_meters" INTEGER /* Climb of the event in meters */,
  "gmap" TEXT /* Google Maps link to the event location */,
  "web" TEXT /* Web link to the event details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the venue */,
  "course_details" TEXT /* Details of the course (e.g., terrain, obstacles) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants the venue can accommodate */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Facilities available at the venue (e.g., parking, showers, restrooms) */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Accessibility information (e.g., wheelchair accessible) */,
  "map_url" TEXT /* URL to a map of the venue */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Typical weather conditions at the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the participant */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "shirt_size" TEXT /* Preferred shirt size for race t-shirts */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions or allergies */,
  "bib_number" TEXT /* Bib number assigned to the participant */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the participant is part of (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the participant is registered for */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the participant registered for the event */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the registration (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "bib_number" TEXT /* Bib number assigned to the participant */,
  "registration_type" TEXT /* Type of registration (e.g., early bird, standard) */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code used during registration */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code used during registration */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the participant took part in */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the participant */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the participant in the event */,
  "chip_time" TEXT /* Time recorded by the chip */,
  "net_time" TEXT /* Net time after adjustments */,
  "pace" TEXT /* Average pace of the participant */,
  "age_grade" REAL /* Age-graded performance */,
  "category_position" INTEGER /* Position in the participant's category */,
  "team_position" INTEGER /* Position in the participant's team (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the category is active or not */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for participants */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for participants */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the format is active or not */,
  "min_team_size" INTEGER /* Minimum team size for team events */,
  "max_team_size" INTEGER /* Maximum team size for team events */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_assignments_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES event_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_assignments_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES event_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_assignments_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, event organizer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
